name: Cancer: The Emperor of All Maladies
original_name: Cancer: The Emperor of All Maladies
overview: The documentary series aims to reshape the way the public sees cancer and strip away some of the fear and misunderstanding that has long surrounded it. The story of cancer is a story of human ingenuity, resilience, and perseverance but also of hubris, paternalism and misperception.

trailers.title: CANCER: THE EMPEROR OF ALL MALADIES | A Story of Hope | PBS
